notes: This catalog is user-facing first. It describes what people ask Kyberion to do.
Mission, task session, actuator, and ADF details remain backend execution concerns unless inspection is needed.
Legacy operator and maintenance intents remain available for internal and operator use.
When an intent is meant to produce a reusable pipeline, it should pass through the pipeline crystallization loop: explore, normalize, crystallize, verify, then freeze.

intents.description: Create a new long-lived project context and prepare the first work items.
surface_examples: Webサービスを作って
新しいプロジェクトを立ち上げて
新規事業の管理基盤を作って

intents.description: Capture a photo for record keeping, sharing, or OCR source use.
surface_examples: ちょっと写真をとって
共有用の写真を撮って
この紙をOCR用に撮影して

intents.description: Open a website or navigate the active browser session to a requested destination.
surface_examples: 日経新聞を開いて
Open OpenAI docs
このサイトを見せて

intents.description: Continue an active browser conversation session with a step command or confirmation.
surface_examples: 左下の承認ボタンを押して
1つ目
それで進めて

intents.description: Create a presentation artifact such as a PowerPoint deck.
surface_examples: このPDFをパワポにして
提案資料のパワーポイントを書いて
3枚の要約スライドを作って
営業資料をパワポで作って
社内共有のスライドを作って
この要件定義を説明する資料を作って
新機能の告知用スライドを作って

intents.description: Create a report artifact such as docx or pdf output.
surface_examples: 今週の進捗レポートを作って
会議の報告書をdocxで作って

intents.description: Create a workbook artifact such as an Excel WBS or structured sheet.
surface_examples: プロジェクトのWBSをエクセルで作って
座席表をxlsxにして
plan_outline: map it into rows and columns

intents.description: Inspect service state or logs and return a concise summary.
surface_examples: voice-hub の状態を見て
presence-studio のログを見て

intents.description: Start a governed service and report the resulting state.
surface_examples: サービスを起動して
start the service
このサービスを立ち上げて

intents.description: Stop a governed service and report the resulting state.
surface_examples: サービスを停止して
stop the service
このサービスを止めて

intents.description: Search accumulated governed knowledge and return a concise answer with relevant sources.
surface_examples: mission authority を教えて
ナレッジで planner を調べて
plan_outline: return a concise answer with citations

intents.description: Review past requirements, incidents, or prior fixes and identify where the same bug or control gap must be propagated and remediated.
surface_examples: 過去の要件定義を横断的に見て横展開されていないバグを修正して
Review prior requirements and find where the same bug still needs to be fixed
同じ不具合が未展開のプロジェクトを洗い出して remediation plan を作って
plan_outline: search governed requirements and prior evidence
prepare a governed remediation plan and follow-up work

intents.description: Review code, design, or delivery scope in the light of prior incidents and return findings, risks, and required follow-up checks.
surface_examples: 過去のインシデント結果を踏まえてレビューを実施して
Review this change based on prior incidents and known failures
障害の振り返りを踏まえて今回の設計をレビューして
plan_outline: review the current target against those lessons
return governed findings and follow-up checks

intents.description: Improve an agent harness through a benchmark-driven experiment loop with baseline, one-change iteration, and governed keep or discard decisions.
surface_examples: このエージェントのハーネスを benchmark ベースで改善して
Improve this agent harness against the benchmark and keep only general wins
program.md 方式で改善ループを定義してハーネスを良くして
plan_outline: establish the target harness and protected edit boundary
run the baseline benchmark or evaluation corpus
cluster failure modes and choose one general improvement
rerun evaluation and record keep or discard evidence

intents.description: Coordinate a personal-life booking or reservation workflow by capturing preferences, comparing options, and returning an approval-ready plan before execution.
surface_examples: 6/6-6/8で沖縄のホテルを探して
来週のレストラン予約を手配して
サブスクの解約を相談したい
今夜のレストランを予約したい
週末の美容院を予約して
歯医者の予約を取りたい
日用品をまとめて買って
家事代行を手配して
plan_outline: capture the booking goal and constraints
perform the site-selection or reservation preflight
compare candidates and prepare an approval-ready plan

intents.description: Run, facilitate, or proxy a live online meeting while tracking decisions, owners, and follow-up work.
surface_examples: このTeams会議を進行して
オンラインミーティングに代わりに参加して
会議の決定事項とアクションアイテムを整理して
打ち合わせをファシリテートして
plan_outline: capture the meeting purpose and authority boundary
prepare the meeting brief and role expectations
facilitate the session, track action items, and produce a summary

params.message: meeting-operations needs meeting_url before live execution. Compile the meeting brief first.
meeting-operations needs mission_id before live execution. Provide a governed mission context.

intents.description: Adjust, reschedule, or coordinate a calendar or schedule while preserving constraints and follow-up.
surface_examples: スケジュールを調整して
来週の予定を変更したい
会議の日程を調整して
打ち合わせをリスケしたい
打ち合わせの日程をずらしたい
カレンダーを組み直して
リスケして
予定を整えて
plan_outline: capture whose schedule is being changed and the time window
identify fixed constraints and allowed changes
propose or apply the new schedule and record follow-up

intents.description: Execute a browser task while recording, then distill the recorded trace through the pipeline crystallization loop into a reusable automation pipeline (ADF).
surface_examples: この操作を学習してpipeline化して
Record this browser flow and create a reusable pipeline
ブラウザ操作を自動化して
plan_outline: frame the target task and start recording browser trace
execute the browser operations and capture the interaction trace
distill the trace into a reusable ADF pipeline artifact
verify the generated pipeline and return the result

intents.description: Record a series of desktop operations (mouse clicks, keyboard inputs, application switches) and distill them through the pipeline crystallization loop into a reusable OS-level macro pipeline.
surface_examples: デスクトップでのこの一連の操作をマクロにして
Record these mouse and keyboard steps as a macro
PC操作を自動化して
plan_outline: start OS interaction recording with high-fidelity event capture
monitor and record mouse/keyboard events and window context
distill the event stream into a parameterized ADF macro pipeline
test the generated macro and save as a custom pipeline

intents.description: Analyze a manual code change or refactoring pattern and generate a reusable 'Code Mod' pipeline to apply that pattern across the workspace after crystallizing the stable transformation shape.
surface_examples: このコード修正パターンを学習して横展開できるようにして
Learn this refactoring and create a code transformation pipeline
修正パターンを自動化して
plan_outline: analyze the 'before' and 'after' state of the sample code change
extract the underlying transformation logic and constraints
generate an ADF pipeline using code-actuator (regex/AST) to apply the change
verify the transformation on a test file and save the pipeline

intents.description: Extract brand design tokens (colors, fonts, logo elements) from an existing PowerPoint file or website URL to create a reusable design theme.
surface_examples: このパワポのデザインをテーマ化して
このWebサイトをベースにデザインテーマを作って
Extract brand styles from this URL
plan_outline: access the source asset (load file or navigate to URL)
extract visual design tokens using media or vision actuators
synthesize tokens into a reusable Kyberion Design Spec
save as a registered Presentation Preference Profile

intents.description: Generate and build a functional web site prototype based on a conceptual brief and optionally an extracted design theme.
surface_examples: このコンセプトでWebサイトを構築して
Build a landing page for this product idea
AIエージェントの紹介サイトを作って
plan_outline: frame the site structure and content from the conceptual brief
apply the selected design theme or brand styles
deploy a local preview or verify the site layout in browser

intents.description: Onboard and activate a declared messaging communication channel implementation (currently Slack and macOS iMessage) by verifying credentials, reconciling the surface manifest, and starting the bridge service. Unsupported platforms require a scaffolded bridge first.
surface_examples: Slackブリッジを起動して
iMessageの連携を設定して
Setup Slack bridge
Enable iMessage communication
plan_outline: verify or request the required API tokens or local permissions
confirm the requested platform has a declared bridge implementation
reconcile active-surfaces.json and start the bridge service

intents.description: Scan and report on network connectivity, speed, and latency to ensure reliable agent-to-agent communication.
surface_examples: ネットワークの状態を診断して
回線速度や安定性を見て
Check network health
plan_outline: check primary interface status and IP configuration
measure latency to core Kyberion service endpoints
detect potential firewall or proxy obstructions

intents.description: Identify connected displays, resolutions, and active workspace surfaces available for visual interaction.
surface_examples: モニターや画面の設定を確認して
ディスプレイの解像度を教えて
Inspect connected displays

intents.description: Verify the active response health of messaging bridges and internal services (not just if they are running).
surface_examples: SlackやTelegramがちゃんと動いてるか確認して
サービスの応答速度を見て
Check messaging bridge reliability
plan_outline: ping active bridge processes for response heartbeat
verify API connectivity for configured gateways
check log for recent communication errors

intents.description: Provide a comprehensive, user-friendly guide of all available Kyberion intents, capabilities, and automation workflows.
surface_examples: 何ができるの？
依頼できることの一覧を見せて
Kyberionで自動化できることを教えて
Show me your capabilities
What can you do?
plan_outline: scan the standard-intents catalog and specialized pipelines
generate a formatted guide or interactive menu of outcomes

intents.description: Return live information such as weather, location, or web search results.
surface_examples: 今日の天気を教えて
今の場所を教えて
WebでOpenAI Responses APIを検索して
plan_outline: summarize the answer for the surface

intents.description: Ask focused follow-up questions when the current request is underspecified or ambiguous.
surface_examples: 不足している情報を質問して
この依頼を明確化して
必要な前提を確認して
何を確認すればいいか整理して
Ask me the missing questions
plan_outline: inspect the current request and missing context
generate a small set of targeted clarification questions
return the questions without losing the current thread context

intents.description: Continue an active human-LLM conversation while preserving the running context and intent.
surface_examples: 続けて
それで進めて
そのまま続けて
Please continue the conversation
Keep going

intents.description: Summarize the current conversation into decisions, open questions, and next steps.

今の議論のポイントを整理して
Summarize the conversation

plan_outline: return a concise summary for reuse

intents.description: Turn a conversation into a governed mission brief or escalation proposal.
surface_examples: この会話をミッションにして
mission brief にまとめて
会話内容を実行可能な仕事にして
Turn this conversation into a mission
Create a mission brief from this thread
plan_outline: extract the durable goal from the conversation

return a mission proposal that can be promoted

intents.description: Compare strategic options and return an executive-ready recommendation with assumptions, risks, and next actions.

成長戦略の論点整理をして
plan_outline: compare strategic options against decision criteria

intents.description: Prioritize executive work, explicitly separating what to do now from what to defer or stop.

やることとやらないことを整理して

intents.description: Create a concise executive summary for management meetings, KPI reviews, or decision checkpoints.

経営レポートを作って

intents.description: Prepare account strategy, upsell hypotheses, and next actions for an important customer or prospect.

intents.description: Create a technical decision memo that compares options, tradeoffs, recommendation, and revisit conditions.

intents.description: Compare available LLM or reasoning providers and recommend a provider/model policy for the use case.

plan_outline: compare providers by capability, cost, latency, and governance

intents.description: Prepare a measured tuning plan for agent runtime latency, cost, capacity, or reliability.

agent runtimeを低遅延に調整したい

intents.description: Assess release readiness and return a go/no-go recommendation with blockers, conditions, and rollback notes.

intents.description: Extract reusable operator preference or request-pattern learning from repeated interactions and propose a tiered memory update.

separate personal, confidential, and public learning candidates
return proposed profile updates and evidence

intents.description: Perform full ecosystem reconciliation (dates, docs, integrity).
Scan for PII and check pulse integrity.
Rebuild all actuators and redeploy ecosystem.
Validate all schemas and metadata.
Run routine maintenance tasks (fix shebangs, sanitize deps).
Kyberion runtime baseline and surfaces are prepared for operation.

ランタイムを立ち上げて

readinessを検証して
